debug_info.goal:
α nt : Type
G : ContextFreeGrammar α nt
u v : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
cfd : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u v
h_not_same : u ≠ v
u' : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
dstep : G.ContextFreeDerivationStep u
derivation : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u' v
sound : dstep.result = u'
h_exhaustive :
  ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustiveCondition α nt G u v
    (ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound)
h_constructor_cfd : cfd = ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound
rightSide : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z }) := (↑dstep.prod).rhs
allChildren : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) :=
  @ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes.match_2 α nt G u v cfd u' dstep sound
    (fun derivation h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd => List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }))
    derivation h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd (fun h_same h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd h_constructor => [])
    fun u'' dstep' derivation' sound' h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd h_constructor =>
    have u'_comp := ⋯;
    have derivation_exhaustive :=
      ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustive_imp_child_exhaustive α nt G u v cfd h_exhaustive u' dstep
        derivation sound ⋯;
    collectDerivationTreeNodes derivation derivation_exhaustive ⋯
u_comp✝ : dstep.pre.len + (Word.mk [Sum.inl (↑dstep.prod).lhs]).len + dstep.suf.len = u.len
var_len_1 : (Word.mk [Sum.inl (↑dstep.prod).lhs]).len = 1
pre_len_less_u_len : dstep.pre.len < u.len
u_comp : dstep.pre.len + (Word.mk [Sum.inl (↑dstep.prod).lhs]).len + dstep.suf.len = u.len
suf_len_less_u_len : dstep.suf.len < u.len
leftOfVarCount : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u.len } := ⟨dstep.pre.len, ⋯⟩
rightOfVarCount : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u.len } := ⟨dstep.suf.len, ⋯⟩
rhs_symbol_count : ℕ := (↑dstep.prod).rhs.len
u'_eq_result : dstep.result = u'
n : ℕ
h_num_vars_rhs : (↑dstep.prod).rhs.len = n + 1
h_rhs_non_empty : 1 ≤ (↑dstep.prod).rhs.len
h_u_vs_u'_len : u'.len = u.len + (rhs_symbol_count - 1)
h_u_vs_u'_len₂ : u.len ≤ u'.len
u_range_subset_u'_range : Finset.range u.len ⊆ Finset.range u'.len
leftOfVarCount₂ : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len } := ⟨↑leftOfVarCount, ⋯⟩
index₁ : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }
h_index_valid : ∃ location ∈ allChildren, location.2 = index₁
afunc : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) →
  G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len } → List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) :=
  fun prev x =>
    @ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes.match_3 α nt G u'
      (fun x => List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })) x fun DT index₂ =>
      if h_is : index₁ = index₂ then prev ++ [(DT, index₂)] else prev
afuncDef :
  afunc = fun prev x =>
    @ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes.match_3 α nt G u'
      (fun x => List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })) x fun DT index₂ =>
      if h_is : index₁ = index₂ then prev ++ [(DT, index₂)] else prev
a : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) := List.foldl afunc [] allChildren
aDef : a = List.foldl afunc [] allChildren
head₁ : G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }
tail₁ : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })
head₂ : G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }
tail₂ : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })
h_head_tail_neq_nil : head₁ :: tail₁ ≠ []
h_pos₂ : tail₂ ≠ []
h_pos₁ : tail₁ ≠ []
ind_hyp₂ : ¬List.foldl afunc tail₁ tail₂ = [] → ¬List.foldl afunc (head₁ :: tail₁) tail₂ = []
ind_hyp₁ : ¬List.foldl afunc (afunc tail₁ head₂) tail₂ = []
h_neg_head₂ : ¬index₁ = head₂.2
⊢ ¬List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev)
        (if index₁ = head₂.2 then head₁ :: (tail₁ ++ [head₂]) else head₁ :: tail₁) tail₂ =
      []

proof:
simp [h_neg_head₂]
                      intro h_contra
                      have : head₁ :: tail₁ ≠ [] := List.cons_ne_nil _ _
                      have h_foldl_preserves : ∀ (l : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })) (acc : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })), acc ≠ [] → List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) acc l ≠ [] := by
                        intro l
                        induction l with
                        | nil => simp
                        | cons hd tl ih =>
                          intro acc h_acc
                          simp only [List.foldl_cons]
                          apply ih
                          split_ifs
                          · simp [h_acc]
                          · exact h_acc
                      exact h_foldl_preserves tail₂ (head₁ :: tail₁) (List.cons_ne_nil _ _) h_contra
failed_attempts:
simp only [h_neg_head₂, ↓reduceIte]
                      exact afunc_monotone (head₁ :: tail₁) tail₂ (List.cons_ne_nil _ _)

simp only [h_neg_head₂, ↓reduceDIte]
                      have h_cons_ne : head₁ :: tail₁ ≠ [] := List.cons_ne_nil _ _
                      exact ind_hyp₂ h_cons_ne

simp [h_neg_head₂]
                      intro h_contra
                      have : head₁ :: tail₁ ≠ [] := List.cons_ne_nil _ _
                      have h_fold_ne : List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) (head₁ :: tail₁) tail₂ ≠ [] := by
                        induction tail₂ generalizing head₁ tail₁ with
                        | nil => simp [List.cons_ne_nil]
                        | cons hd tl ih =>
                          simp only [List.foldl_cons]
                          by_cases h : index₁ = hd.2
                          · simp [h]
                            apply ih
                          · simp [h]
                            apply ih
                      exact h_fold_ne h_contra
exact h_mono (head₁ :: tail₁) this h_contra
exact this (head₁ :: tail₁) h_cons_ne h_contra

simp [h_neg_head₂]
                      have h_cons_ne : head₁ :: tail₁ ≠ [] := List.cons_ne_nil head₁ tail₁
                      exact ind_hyp₂ (ind_hyp₁)

simp [h_neg_head₂]
                      intro h_contra
                      have : head₁ :: tail₁ ≠ [] := List.cons_ne_nil _ _
                      have h_foldl_preserves : ∀ (l : List _) (acc : List _), acc ≠ [] → List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) acc l ≠ [] := by
                        intro l
                        induction l with
                        | nil => simp
                        | cons hd tl ih =>
                          intro acc h_acc
                          simp only [List.foldl_cons]
                          by_cases h : index₁ = hd.2
                          · simp [h]
                            apply ih
                            simp [h_acc]
                          · simp [h]
                            exact ih acc h_acc
                      exact h_foldl_preserves tail₂ (head₁ :: tail₁) this h_contra

simp only [List.foldl_cons]
                          apply ih
                          split_ifs with h
                          · exact List.append_ne_nil_of_left_ne_nil hl [hd]
                          · exact hl
                      exact h_mono (head₁ :: tail₁) tail₂ this h_contra

simp [h_neg_head₂]
                      exact ind_hyp₂ ind_hyp₁

simp only [h_neg_head₂, ↓reduceIte]
                      intro h_contra
                      have : head₁ :: tail₁ ≠ [] := List.cons_ne_nil _ _
                      have h_foldl_preserves : ∀ (l : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })),
                        head₁ :: tail₁ ≠ [] → List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) (head₁ :: tail₁) l ≠ [] := by
                        intro l
                        induction l with
                        | nil => simp
                        | cons hd tl ih =>
                          intro hne
                          simp only [List.foldl_cons]
                          apply ih
                          split_ifs with h
                          · exact List.append_ne_nil_of_left_ne_nil (head₁ :: tail₁) [(hd.1, hd.2)] (List.cons_ne_nil _ _)
                          · exact hne
                      exact h_foldl_preserves tail₂ (List.cons_ne_nil _ _) h_contra

simp [h_neg_head₂]
                      intro h_contra
                      have : head₁ :: tail₁ ≠ [] := List.cons_ne_nil _ _
                      have h_foldl_preserves : ∀ l : List _, head₁ :: tail₁ ≠ [] → 
                        List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) (head₁ :: tail₁) l ≠ [] := by
                        intro l _
                        induction l generalizing head₁ tail₁ with
                        | nil => simp [List.cons_ne_nil]
                        | cons hd tl ih =>
                          simp only [List.foldl_cons]
                          split_ifs with h_eq
                          · apply ih
                            simp [List.cons_ne_nil]
                          · apply ih
                            exact List.cons_ne_nil _ _
                      exact h_foldl_preserves tail₂ (List.cons_ne_nil _ _) h_contra

simp [h_neg_head₂]
                      apply ind_hyp₂
                      exact ind_hyp₁

simp [h_neg_head₂]
                      have h_start_nonempty : head₁ :: tail₁ ≠ [] := List.cons_ne_nil _ _
                      intro h_contra
                      have : ∀ (l : List _) (acc : List _), acc ≠ [] → List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) acc l ≠ [] := by
                        intro l
                        induction l with
                        | nil => simp
                        | cons hd tl ih =>
                          intro acc h_acc
                          simp only [List.foldl_cons]
                          apply ih
                          by_cases index₁ = hd.2
                          case pos h => simp [h]; exact List.append_ne_nil_of_left_ne_nil acc [(hd)] h_acc
                          case neg h => simp [h]; exact h_acc
                      exact this tail₂ (head₁ :: tail₁) h_start_nonempty h_contra

simp [h_neg_head₂]
                      intro h_contra
                      have h_cons_ne_nil : head₁ :: tail₁ ≠ [] := List.cons_ne_nil _ _
                      have : List.foldl afunc (head₁ :: tail₁) tail₂ ≠ [] := by
                        apply ind_hyp₂
                        apply afunc_monotone
                        exact h_cons_ne_nil
                      simp [afuncDef] at this
                      simp [h_neg_head₂] at this
                      exact this h_contra

simp only [h_neg_head₂, ↓reduceDIte]
                      exact ind_hyp₂ ind_hyp₁

simp [h_neg_head₂]
                      intro h_contra
                      have : head₁ :: tail₁ ≠ [] := List.cons_ne_nil _ _
                      have h_fold_preserves : ∀ l : List _, l ≠ [] → List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) l tail₂ ≠ [] := by
                        intro l hl
                        induction tail₂ generalizing l with
                        | nil => simp [hl]
                        | cons hd tl ih =>
                          simp only [List.foldl_cons]
                          apply ih
                          split_ifs
                          · simp [List.append_ne_nil_of_left_ne_nil hl]
                          · exact hl
                      exact h_fold_preserves (head₁ :: tail₁) this h_contra

simp [h_neg_head₂]
                      exact ind_hyp₂ ind_hyp₁

simp only [h_neg_head₂, ↓reduceIte]
                      exact ind_hyp₂ ind_hyp₁

simp [h_neg_head₂]
                      intro h_contra
                      have : head₁ :: tail₁ ≠ [] := by simp
                      have h_fold_ne : List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) (head₁ :: tail₁) tail₂ ≠ [] := by
                        induction tail₂ generalizing head₁ tail₁
                        case nil => simp
                        case cons h t ih =>
                          simp only [List.foldl_cons]
                          by_cases h_eq : index₁ = h.2
                          · simp [h_eq]
                            apply ih
                          · simp [h_eq]
                            apply ih
                      exact h_fold_ne h_contra

simp only [List.foldl_cons]
                          apply ih
                          split_ifs
                          · simp [h_acc]
                          · exact h_acc
                      exact this tail₂ (head₁ :: tail₁) h_nonempty h_contra
exact h_foldl_ne (head₁ :: tail₁) this h_contra

simp [h_neg_head₂]
                      have h_cons_ne_nil : head₁ :: tail₁ ≠ [] := List.cons_ne_nil _ _
                      intro h_foldl_eq_nil
                      have : ∀ (l : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })) (init : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })), init ≠ [] → List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) init l ≠ [] := by
                        intro l
                        induction l with
                        | nil => simp
                        | cons hd tl ih =>
                          intro init h_init
                          simp only [List.foldl_cons]
                          apply ih
                          by_cases index₁ = hd.2
                          case pos h => simp [h]; exact List.append_ne_nil_of_left_ne_nil init [(hd.1, hd.2)] h_init
                          case neg h => simp [h]; exact h_init
                      exact this tail₂ (head₁ :: tail₁) h_cons_ne_nil h_foldl_eq_nil

simp [h_neg_head₂]
                      intro h_contra
                      have : head₁ :: tail₁ ≠ [] := List.cons_ne_nil head₁ tail₁
                      induction tail₂ generalizing tail₁ with
                      | nil => simp at h_contra
                      | cons hd tl ih =>
                        simp only [List.foldl_cons] at h_contra
                        by_cases h : index₁ = hd.2
                        · simp only [h, ↓reduceDIte] at h_contra
                          exact ih ((head₁ :: tail₁) ++ [hd]) (List.append_ne_nil_of_left_ne_nil (List.cons_ne_nil _ _) _) h_contra
                        · simp only [h, ↓reduceDIte] at h_contra
                          exact ih (head₁ :: tail₁) (List.cons_ne_nil _ _) h_contra

simp [h_neg_head₂]
                      exact ind_hyp₂ ind_hyp₁

simp only [h_neg_head₂, ↓reduceIte]
                      intro h_contra
                      have : head₁ :: tail₁ ≠ [] := List.cons_ne_nil _ _
                      have h_fold_ne : List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) (head₁ :: tail₁) tail₂ ≠ [] := by
                        induction tail₂ generalizing head₁ tail₁ with
                        | nil => simp [List.cons_ne_nil]
                        | cons hd tl ih =>
                          simp only [List.foldl_cons]
                          by_cases h : index₁ = hd.2
                          · simp only [h, ↓reduceIte]
                            exact ih (head₁ :: tail₁ ++ [hd]).head (head₁ :: tail₁ ++ [hd]).tail (by simp)
                          · simp only [h, ↓reduceIte]
                            exact ih head₁ tail₁ (List.cons_ne_nil _ _)
                      exact h_fold_ne h_contra

simp only [h_neg_head₂, ↓reduceIte]
                      exact ind_hyp₂ ind_hyp₁

simp only [h_neg_head₂, ↓reduceIte]
                      exact ind_hyp₂ ind_hyp₁

simp [h_neg_head₂]
                      exact ind_hyp₁

simp only [h_neg_head₂, ↓reduceIte]
                      exact ind_hyp₂ ind_hyp₁

simp [h_neg_head₂]
                      intro h_contra
                      have : head₁ :: tail₁ ≠ [] := List.cons_ne_nil head₁ tail₁
                      have h_mono : ∀ l₁ l₂ : List _, l₁ ≠ [] → List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) l₁ l₂ ≠ [] := by
                        intro l₁ l₂ hl₁
                        induction l₂ generalizing l₁ with
                        | nil => simp [hl₁]
                        | cons hd tl ih =>
                          simp only [List.foldl_cons]
                          apply ih
                          by_cases h : index₁ = hd.2
                          · simp [h, List.append_ne_nil_of_left_ne_nil hl₁]
                          · simp [h, hl₁]
                      exact h_mono (head₁ :: tail₁) tail₂ this h_contra
successful_attempts:
simp [h_neg_head₂]
                      intro h_contra
                      have : head₁ :: tail₁ ≠ [] := List.cons_ne_nil _ _
                      have h_foldl_preserves : ∀ (l : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })) (acc : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })), acc ≠ [] → List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) acc l ≠ [] := by
                        intro l
                        induction l with
                        | nil => simp
                        | cons hd tl ih =>
                          intro acc h_acc
                          simp only [List.foldl_cons]
                          apply ih
                          split_ifs
                          · simp [h_acc]
                          · exact h_acc
                      exact h_foldl_preserves tail₂ (head₁ :: tail₁) (List.cons_ne_nil _ _) h_contra
